items.title: Journalists Explain Colorectal Cancer Risk and Federal Pullback on Georgia Disability Oversight
items.description: KFF Health News journalists made the rounds on national and local media recently to discuss topical stories. Here’s a collection of their appearances.

items.title: Should Drug Companies Be Advertising to Consumers?
items.description: Aging means “becoming a target” of the industry, one expert said. After decades of debate, politicians of all stripes are proposing bans.
